projectMetadata.projectType: Industrial food-processing facility; MH Construction role TBD

executiveSummary: Darigold's Pasco production facility began as a Port of Pasco industrial-development project and reached milk-processing startup in 2025. MH Construction field documentation captured exterior closeout conditions on 2025-10-22 across frontage, entrances, parking, loading-dock doors, glazing, accessibility, and EV charging areas. MH package-level scope confirmation remains pending.
clientBackground: Darigold operates the Pasco production facility in the Port of Pasco Reimann Industrial Center as a rail-adjacent dairy-processing site serving regional farm supply and food-manufacturing distribution.
challenge: Coordinate facility delivery context and attribution in a multi-party industrial project while maintaining strict verification standards for publicly published claims.
scopeOfWork: MH contracted scope remains TBD pending contract-level documentation
Captured frontage, entrances, parking, accessibility, loading-dock, and EV charging visible conditions
Installation and commissioning ownership for photographed elements remains TBD

timelineAndMilestones.name: Groundbreaking documented
timelineAndMilestones.note: Darigold and Port of Pasco announced construction of the new production facility.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Underground-plumbing permit issued
timelineAndMilestones.note: City permit B23-0962 listed Darigold as owner and JRT Mechanical as contractor.

timelineAndMilestones.name: Milk processing underway announced
timelineAndMilestones.note: Public opening announcement confirmed staged production startup.

timelineAndMilestones.name: MH exterior closeout field documentation captured
timelineAndMilestones.note: Eleven documented capture groups covering exterior conditions and frontage elements.

executionDetails: Public evidence reflects a multi-party delivery model. This package captures dated field evidence from MH media while deferring package-level trade ownership claims until verification is complete.
outcomesAndImpact: Created a verified exterior closeout documentation package
Connected field conditions to public milestone context
Prepared staged web content with conservative scope language
Held publication-sensitive claims pending legal and scope verification

mediaManifest.caption: Main entrance glazing and adjacent parking frontage at Darigold Pasco production facility.
Facility frontage showing marked accessible parking stalls.
Row of loading dock doors with adjacent parking and circulation area.
Main entrance elevation with landscaped frontage and parking stalls.

seoInputs.suggestedPageTitle: Darigold Pasco Production Facility | MH Construction
seoInputs.suggestedMetaDescription: MH Construction field documentation from Darigold's Pasco production facility, covering exterior closeout conditions and public project milestones.

approvalAndPublishingNotes.redactionsNeeded: Confirm MH contracted scope, media credit and usage rights, safety records, completion status, testimonial, and approver identity before publication.
